arts.ttl: Chelsea held “informal meeting” with club director regarding 19-year-old Liverpool target
arts.sum: Jorrel Hato has been linked with a move to the Premier League in recent months, and Chelsea have spoken about him to Ajax technical director Alex Kroes. The player has been heavily linked with Liverpool as well. However, journalist Mike Verweij (via Voetbal Nieuws) has now confirmed that Chelsea held an informal meeting regarding the […] The post Chelsea held “informal meeting” with club director regarding 19-year-old Liverpool target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool, Man City and Chelsea are lining up to sign attacking right-back
arts.sum: Flamengo’s 21-year-old right-back Wesley has emerged as one of the most sought-after talents in the upcoming transfer window. Known for his attacking quality, Wesley has attracted interest from several European giants, including Liverpool, Manchester City, Chelsea, Arsenal and Barcelona, according to Caught Offside sources. Chelsea have made initial contact with Wesley’s representatives, expressing interest in […] The post Exclusive: Liverpool, Man City and Chelsea are lining up to sign attacking right-back appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Do Premier League teams have to give a guard of honour? Chelsea set to show Liverpool respect
arts.sum: Liverpool have officially been crowned Premier League champions but have four games of the season left with their opponents tipped to stick by the Guard of Honour tradition

arts.ttl: 5 Players Your Forgot Played for Chelsea and Liverpool
arts.sum: Fernando Torres, Mohamed Salah, Joe Cole, Raheem Sterling and Dominic Solanke are among the players that have played for both Chelsea and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'seriously considering' move for 19-year-old defender wanted by Liverpool, Arsenal
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly 'seriously considering' a summer approach for a teenage defender also tipped to sign for Liverpool and Arsenal in the upcoming transfer window.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool now believe Chelsea are the most likely team to sign £50m player this summer
arts.sum: The summer transfer window is almost upon us, and, once again, the Premier League’s top dogs are going to do battle over some big-name players....
